items.title: [正面] 游戏性很好（其实就是杀戮尖塔）。内容就是美少女＋DBG，画风也算是不错的那一档。但是游戏剧情比较一般...
items.summary: 游戏性很好（其实就是杀戮尖塔）。内容就是美少女＋DBG，画风也算是不错的那一档。但是游戏剧情比较一般（不过真的有人会在意二游的剧情吗），运营和策划都很烂。只是抽自己喜欢的角色的话基本都能抽到，强度党玩起来会很赤石，只是收集的话，以目前体验到的福利来说，大部分都是可以抽到的。总之就是轻度玩家推荐试试这个游戏，喜欢拉强度什么的完全不建议玩这个。

items.title: [正面] It's what I was looking for while waiting for Chao...
items.summary:
It's what I was looking for while waiting for Chaos Zero Nightmare to release. 

Gameplay is exactly like Slay the Spire but with four separate characters with different cards and gimmicks. There are 4 factions, 3 have a whole different play style and characters from these can't be placed within them, with the fourth faction, Chaos, able to be placed in any of the other factions.

Translation is a bit rough to interpret with the ChatGPT translation. So far i'm in the middle of Chapter 2, the translation most of the time is pretty decent but there are a lot of things like calling someone who's a she a he. There were a couple of times it said something I didn't understand. The Devs do plan to get an official translation according to what people say in their discord but it won't be for awhile. I do think this should be their top priority expanding to other countries.

Story and atmosphere is very good so far. The game is pretty dark and has some interesting characters. There are some intense moments but I really wish the devs took some time to put a bit of art to better illustrate the horror. Like when someone snaps their own neck during dialogue, I kinda wish it would be a jump scare and show the image. I feel like from a story perspective for this type of horror it would add a lot more impact. Sometimes there are things happening that I can't picture. Hopefully this is something they implemented sometime after chapter 2.

Character Illustration during battle is very Slay the Spire like. During other events like dialogue, majority of the characters have great illustrations representing the characters. My only gripe is that there are a few characters who's illustration have them crouching or having some sort of struggle which does bother me. Jenkins for example is crouching in a way that makes her look like she's constantly sitting and it bothers me because in the story she's walking around standing up straight.

Overall despite some of my gripes I think this is a very solid game. For those looking for a dark story with elements of horror and fun Slay the Spire gamplay this game would be an easy 9/10
